product_depth.justification: Abandon notes contextually appropriate with correct phase/step references. Release entry comprehensive. Minor gap: no git tag means release incomplete.

functionality.justification: Both text insertions present and correct. All 4 manifests synced. release.json and CHANGELOG updated. Missing git tag is the only functional gap.

visual_design.justification: Command file clarity and formatting consistency maintained. Em-dash style, backtick-wrapped commands, consistent prose voice. CHANGELOG follows established pattern.

code_quality.justification: Markdown-only changes are concise, accurate, and non-disruptive. Release metadata correct with proper feature listing and version lineage.

session.md line 81 contains abandon/resume guidance after approval enforcement sentence.

git tag -l v2.2.8 returns empty. No git tag exists.
